Headline: #73 Armitage Temporary Reroute at Armitage/Sheffield
ShortDescription: #73 Armitage buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield and Armitage due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#73 Armitage buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield, then resume their normal route on Armitage.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.

Headline: #95 95th Temporary Reroute near Woodlawn/95th
ShortDescription: 95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to police activity near Woodlawn/95th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#95 95th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to police activity near Woodlawn/95th.

Westbound buses will operate via 95th, Cottage Grove and over regular route. 

Eastbound buses will operate via 95th, Woodlawn and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Reroute at 115th/Wentworth
ShortDescription: 115 Pullman/115th  buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 115th/Wentworth, due to street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#115 Pullman/115th  buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near 115th/Wentworth, due to street blockage.

Eastbound buses will operate via 115th, Wentworth, 111th, State, and 115th over to normal route.

Westbound buses will operate via 115th, State, 111th, Wentworth, 115th over to normal route

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Red and Brown Line Service Delayed near Armitage
ShortDescription: Red and Brown Line trains are standing near Armitage due to track conditions. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Red and Brown Line trains are standing near Armitage due to track conditions.

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
